findingDetails.title: Central env reference omits active goal-state cleanup controls
findingDetails.evidence: mk-goal.js defines MK_GOAL_STATE_ARCHIVE_RETENTION_DAYS, MK_GOAL_STATE_ACTIVE_RETENTION_DAYS, and MK_GOAL_STATE_SWEEP_INTERVAL_MS at lines 40-42, uses them in archive/sweep retention paths at lines 825-837 and 874-883, but ENV_REFERENCE.md goal-plugin table at lines 646-660 lists only older controls.
findingDetails.recommendation: Add rows for all three MK_GOAL_STATE_* variables to the OPENCODE GOAL PLUGIN table with defaults 90 days, 30 days, and 1 hour plus source references.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Source-side env definitions and consumers verified in mk-goal.js; central env table verified in ENV_REFERENCE.md; scoped inventory built for follow-up doc classes.

claimAdjudication.claim: ENV_REFERENCE.md omits the three MK_GOAL_STATE_* cleanup/archive env vars that mk-goal.js defines and consumes.
claimAdjudication.counterevidenceSought: Read the OPENCODE GOAL PLUGIN table and searched scoped skill docs for the same env vars; no ENV_REFERENCE.md rows for the three variables were found.
claimAdjudication.alternativeExplanation: The table links to detailed operator guidance, but ENV_REFERENCE.md is the central env reference and already owns the goal-plugin env table.
claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade/refute if ENV_REFERENCE.md documents all three variables elsewhere in an authoritative goal-plugin env table, or if mk-goal.js stops reading those variables.

noveltyJustification: First review iteration confirmed one new active P1 against live source and central env reference evidence.
ruledOut: generic goal mentions in sk-prompt and deep-improvement asset are not plugin-specific
edgeCases: memory_match_triggers rejected the external review session id, so packet sessionId was preserved only in JSONL and memory lookup was retried without session scope

title: Central env reference omits active goal-state cleanup controls

rationale: Live source defines and consumes the three MK_GOAL_STATE_* variables; central ENV_REFERENCE goal-plugin table omits them.

evidence: Glob .opencode/commands/goal.md returned no files; Glob .opencode/commands/*goal*.md returned only .opencode/commands/goal_opencode.md.
